title: ericoides viscarium
intro: Ericoides viscarium, also known as Bearberry or Uva-Ursi, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to heathlands in the Northern Hemisphere. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of arbutin. The health benefits of Ericoides viscarium include its ability to soothe and protect the urinary tract, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and support the immune system. Ericoides viscarium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
